bead.title: feat: implement CDC tombstone emission on delete (Kafka log compaction)
bead.description: CONTRACT-006 normative: Deletes MUST be followed by a tombstone event (same key, null value) for Kafka log compaction. CdcSink::emit currently emits one message per delete envelope. Need to: (1) add CdcSink::emit_tombstone or change emit return type to support two-message emission for deletes; (2) update KafkaCdcSink to send the tombstone immediately after a delete; (3) test tombstone key matches delete key, payload is null.
